payload.summary: Gemini returned non-JSON procedural VFX output.
payload.raw:
{
  "summary": "A procedural particle burst simulating 3D block fragments using rotating squares, radial velocity, and additive blending for a high-energy 'clear' feedback.",
  "duration_ms": 800,
  "palette": [
    "#FFF9C4",
    "#F8BBD0",
    "#FFD54F"
  ],
  "particle_config": {
    "count": 16,
    "shape": "square",
    "size_range": [
      4,
      8
    ],
    "velocity_range": [
      150,
      400
    ],
    "gravity": 600,
    "rotation_speed": [
      -360,
      360
    ],
    "alpha_curve": "linear_fade",
    "scale_curve": "shrink_to_zero",
    "blend_mode": "ADD"
  },
  "typescript": "export const createBlockDebris = (scene: Phaser.Scene, x: number, y: number, colorHex: string = '#FFF9C4') => {\n  const texKey = 'debris_sq';\n  if (!scene.textures.exists(texKey)) {\n    const g = scene.make.graphics({ x: 0, y: 0, add: false });\n    g.fillStyle(0xffffff).fillRect(0, 0, 8, 8);\n    g.generateTexture(texKey, 8, 8);\n  }\n\n  const color = Phaser.Display.Color.HexStringToColor(colorHex).color;\n  const emitter = scene.add.particles(x, y, texKey, {\n    lifespan: 800,\n    speed: { min: 150, max: 400 },\n    angle: { min: 0, max: 360 },\n    gravityY: 600,\n    scale: { start: 1.2, end: 0 },\n    alpha: { start: 1, end: 0 },\n    rotate: { min: 0, max: 720 },\n    tint: color,\n    blendMode: 'ADD',\n    emitting: false\n  });\n\n  emitter.explode(16);\n  scene.time.delayedCall(1000, () => emitter.destroy());\n};"
}
}
